# CleanCrew

> CleanCrew is a premium garage-clearance and exterior-cleaning company in Luxembourg. One team clears your garage and keeps the rest of the property impeccable — windows and driveways/patios — across the whole Grand Duchy. Clear up-front quote, fast turnaround, and the same crew comes back, so it already knows your place.

CleanCrew (cleancrew.lu) is based in Luxembourg and serves the whole Grand Duchy. The site is available in French, English, German, Portuguese, Luxembourgish and Spanish (Portuguese is a first-class language, not a fallback). No hidden costs; no public price lists — pricing is given as a clear quote inside the booking flow.

## Services
- [Garage clearance](https://cleancrew.lu/en/services/clearance): Your garage emptied in a single visit — furniture, boxes and clutter sorted, removed and recycled. The high-need entry point into a whole-property relationship.
- [Window cleaning](https://cleancrew.lu/en/services/windows): Windows, bays, verandas and glass roofs left streak-free, hand-finished. A speed ranked among the best in Luxembourg.
- [Driveway & patio cleaning](https://cleancrew.lu/en/services/surfaces): Pressure washing of driveways, alleys, patios and paved areas — moss, grime and stains lifted in one pass.

## Key facts
- Area served: Luxembourg (Grand Duchy); based in Luxembourg City.
- One team, one visit: services bundle at the same address with no second call-out.
- Differentiators: a crew that returns and already knows the property; recognised speed on windows; clear up-front quote.
- Contact: contact@cleancrew.lu · +352 621 526 847
